reasons: All required rows satisfied BCH dominance semantics.

rows.expected_interpretation: Does frozen high-redundancy BCH remain the preferred exact-record binary control on the frozen exact-weight U1 cells and points?
rows.known_weakness: Development sample size is 16 per point; confirmatory rules are intentionally simple and may fail to generalize on held-out.
rows.why_not_uniquely_optimized: Selected margins are coarse, interpretable guardrails from existing development summaries, not a search over held-out outcomes.
